figures.caption: TABLE I QUANTITATIVE COMPARISON OF VARIOUS METHODS ON THE CHIKUSEI, CAVE, AND PAVIAU DATASETS ACROSS ×2, ×4, AND ×8 SCALING FACTORS. BOLD INDICATES THE BEST PERFORMANCE, WHILE UNDERLINE DENOTES THE SECOND-BEST.

TABLE II QUANTITATIVE EVALUATION ON REAL-WORLD BENCHMARKS (CHIKUSEI, CAVE, AND PAVIAU) UNDER ×4 SCALING FACTORS. THE BOLD AND UNDERLINED RESULTS REPRESENT THE BEST AND SECOND-BEST PERFORMANCE, RESPECTIVELY.

Fig. 9. Model efficiency comparison for ×4 fusion on the PaviaU dataset. The bar chart compares the parameter count (in millions, M) and inference latency (in milliseconds, ms, measured on an Intel Xeon CPU). Note that both axes utilize a logarithmic scale to accommodate the wide range of values.
